stats.fact: TypeScript surged 66% on GitHub in 2025-2026, overtaking Python and JavaScript, powered by AI coding tools convenience loop

Mastra (main TypeScript alternative) has 21,100 GitHub stars, 3M raised (YC W25), 300k+ weekly npm downloads, adopted by Replit, PayPal, Sanity, Brex
